title: hahnia intermedia proles mougeotii
intro: Hahnia intermedia proles mougeotii, also known as Hahnia mougeotii, is a species of lichenized fungus in the family Pyronemataceae. It is known to possess medicinal properties, particularly its extracts which have been found to exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Hahnia mougeotii include its potential to treat various infections and diseases caused by fungal and bacterial pathogens. Herbal preparations of Hahnia mougeotii are typically made by infusing the dried fungus in hot water to create a medicinal tea, which is said to have antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
